title: Mining Revenue
query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(TotalSale), 0) AS total, COUNT(*) AS sales FROM MarketSell WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate AND Type IN ('LowTemperatureDiamond','Painite','Alexandrite','Rhodplumsite','Serendibite','Monazite','Grandidierite','Void Opal','Core Dynamic Composites','Bromellite','Lithium','Indite','Gallite','Coltan','Bertrandite','Bauxite','Cobalt','Gold','Silver','Palladium','Platinum','Osmium')

details.text: {sales} sale(s) of mined commodities totalling {total} Cr during the report period. This is the payoff number that validates all the time spent in the rings — a large total means you found a good spot, refined efficiently, and got to market before prices shifted.
details.help: Filters MarketSell to known mineable commodity types. total drives the title as the headline revenue figure. The commodity list covers laserable, core, and sub-surface minerals.

tagLines: Mining revenue reconciled. The commodities exchanges confirm receipt of refined materials.
The rings paid out. Eventually. After a lot of prospecting.
Everything here was rock thirty minutes ago. Laser physics and patience converted it to credits.
